/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/clover2_aruco_msgs/clover2_aruco_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/clover2_aruco_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/clover2_aruco_msgs/_clover2_aruco_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/motya/projects/coex/clover2_ws/src/clover2/build/clover2_aruco_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib libclover2_aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so libclover2_aruco_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so libclover2_aruco_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
